g.text: 'Our return policy allows for returns within 30 days of deliv'
RETURNS & REFUNDS: 30-day return window from delivery date
'Return shipping is paid by the customer at a flat rate of $6'
Return shipping is paid by the customer ($6.99 flat rate)
Refunds processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the return
'Items must be unused and in their original packaging'
Items must be unused and in original packaging
✗ 'Return shipping is paid by the customer at a flat rate of $6'
No source supports this claim — fabricated
